prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to trace the HTTP call chain from Grafana's Loki datasource to Loki's HTTP API handler to understand the end-to-end query path.
constraints: List chain steps in order from Grafana (caller) to Loki (callee).
Include repo, file path, and symbol name for each step.
prd.success_definition: Agent identifies both the Grafana HTTP client type (LokiAPI in pkg/tsdb/loki/api.go) and Loki's HTTP query parser (ParseInstantQuery in pkg/loghttp/query.go).
prd.seed_prompt: Trace the HTTP call path: when Grafana executes a Loki log query, what type is the HTTP client in grafana/grafana, and what function parses the request in sg-benchmarks/grafana-loki?
